title: pycnanthemum muticum
intro: Pycnanthemum muticum, also known as green mountain mint, is a perennial herb belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae). The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its antimicrobial, antifungal, and anti-inflammatory properties. Green mountain mint has been used to alleviate various health issues, including colds, fever, and digestive problems, due to its expectorant and antispasmodic properties. The plant can be prepared in herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is also used in topical applications to soothe skin irritations and wounds.
